title: best herbal teas for acid reflux
description: Cinchona officinalis tea contains bioactive constituents such as alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to alleviate the symptoms of acid reflux. The tea's properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antacid effects, can help to neutralize stomach acid and reduce inflammation in the esophagus, providing relief from heartburn and discomfort.
